description: Full-stack project dashboard and collaboration hub

frontend.api_proxy: Next.js rewrites proxy /api/v1/* → Fastify backend (no CORS needed)

authentication.overview: OAuth-only authentication via Google and GitHub. JWT stored in HTTP-only cookie.
authentication.auth_mechanism: JWT in HTTP-only cookie + Bearer token fallback

steps: LoginPage generates PKCE challenge (SHA-256 code_verifier)
Stores PKCE verifier in sessionStorage('pkce_verifier')
Redirects to Google OAuth URL (response_type=code, code_challenge=S256)
Google redirects back to /api/auth/google/callback?code=xxx
GoogleCallback page reads ?code and pkce_verifier from sessionStorage
POSTs { code, code_verifier, redirect_uri } to /api/v1/auth/google (Fastify)
Fastify exchanges code for access_token with Google's token endpoint
Fetches user info from https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v2/userinfo
Creates or links user in PostgreSQL (by google_id or email)
Fastify signs JWT and sets HTTP-only cookie (7-day expiry, sameSite=lax)
Returns { token, user } to callback page
Callback sets Bearer token via api.setToken(token)
Callback redirects to /dashboard (client-side router.push)
Dashboard loads → AppContent calls checkSession → GET /api/v1/auth/session → cookie valid → returns user
Redirects to GitHub OAuth URL
GitHub redirects back to /api/auth/github/callback?code=xxx
GithubCallback calls loginWithGithub(code) from auth store
Store posts { code } to /api/v1/auth/github (Fastify)
Fastify exchanges code for access_token with GitHub API
Fetches user info from https://api.github.com/user
Creates or links user in PostgreSQL (by github_id or email)
Sets HTTP-only cookie + returns { token, user }
Redirects to /dashboard

session_check.trigger: Every protected page load via AppContent layout effect
steps: AppContent calls checkSession() (unless on /login or /api/auth/*)
checkSession calls api.getSession() → GET /api/v1/auth/session
Fastify reads HTTP-only cookie, verifies JWT, fetches user from DB
If valid: returns { user, expires } → user set in Zustand store
If invalid (401): user stays null → routing effect redirects to /login

logout.trigger: User clicks logout button in Navbar
steps: Navbar calls logout() from auth store
store/auth.ts: sets ph_logged_out flag in sessionStorage (prevents stale session checks)
Clears Bearer token via api.setToken(null)
Sets user=null in Zustand store
POSTs to /api/v1/auth/logout (Fastify)
Fastify clears HTTP-only cookie via Set-Cookie: Max-Age=0
window.location.href = '/login' (full page navigation)
Login page loads → clears ph_logged_out → calls checkSession() → 401 → user null → stays on login

project_management.overview: Full CRUD for projects with status, visibility, members, tasks, resources, activity tracking, and GitHub integration.

create_project.trigger: User clicks 'New Project' in Navbar or 'Create Project' on dashboard
steps: Navbar sets createProjectOpen=true in UI store
Dashboard renders Modal with form (name, description, icon, status, visibility)
User fills form and clicks 'Create Project'
Dashboard calls api.createProject(form) → POST /api/v1/projects
Fastify creates project in DB with randomUUID, logs 'project_created' activity
Returns 201 with project data
Dashboard refetches project list, closes modal

view_project_detail.trigger: User clicks a project card on dashboard or navigates to /projects/:id
steps: ProjectDetailPage mounts → calls api.getProject(id) → GET /api/v1/projects/:id
Fastify fetches project + members + tasks + resources + activity + linked_repo
Returns all data in a single response
Page renders: hero header, contribution graph, tabbed content (Tasks/Resources/Activity/Members)

update_project.trigger: User clicks Edit on project detail page → modifies fields → Save
steps: Opens Edit modal pre-filled with current values
User changes name/description/icon/status/visibility
Calls api.updateProject(id, edits) → PATCH /api/v1/projects/:id
Fastify validates ownership or role (admin/editor), updates DB
Returns updated project, page refreshes

delete_project.trigger: User clicks trash icon on project card → confirms
steps: ProjectCard calls api.deleteProject(id) → DELETE /api/v1/projects/:id
Fastify checks ownership (only owner can delete)
Cascading delete removes tasks, members, activity, resources, linked_repo
Returns success → list refreshes

task_management.overview: Tasks belong to projects, have priority (P0-P3), status lifecycle, subtasks, due dates, and assignment.

create_task.trigger: User clicks 'Add Task' in project detail → Tasks tab
steps: Opens Create Task modal (title, description, priority, due_date)
Calls api.createTask(projectId, data) → POST /api/v1/projects/:id/tasks
Fastify creates task with auto-incrementing position (MAX(position)+100)
Returns 201 → task list refreshes

toggle_task_status.trigger: User clicks the circular checkbox next to a task
steps: TaskList calls api.updateTask(taskId, { status: 'completed'|'pending' })
Fastify updates task in DB
If status changed TO 'completed': logs 'task_completed' activity (with double-check to avoid React StrictMode double-fire)
Task list refreshes

kanban_move.trigger: User clicks status-change button on a Kanban card
steps: KanbanBoard shows quick-action buttons → {status} for each non-current status
Click calls api.updateTask(taskId, { status: newStatus })
Fastify updates → board refreshes → card moves column

contribution_graph.overview: GitHub-style activity heatmap showing 52 weeks of daily contributions per project.

load_graph.trigger: Project detail page renders ContributionGraph component
steps: Fetches GET /api/v1/projects/:id/contribution-graph
Fastify queries activity_logs grouped by date for last 365 days
Builds 52×7 day grid with level (0-4) based on activity count
Returns { weeks: [[{date, count, level}]], total }
Component renders cells with CSS classes contribution-level-{0-4}

log_activity.trigger: User clicks '+ Log Activity' button above the graph
steps: Calls api.logActivity(projectId, { activity_type: 'time_logged' })
Fastify creates activity_logs entry with user_id, project_id, type, metadata
Graph refreshes to show new contribution
Navbar calls api.getStreaks() → GET /api/v1/streaks
Fastify queries: COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(logged_at)) per project for user
Returns per-project total_active_days and last_activity_date
Sum displayed as flame icon with count in Navbar

resources_links.overview: URL bookmarking with automatic Open Graph metadata extraction.

add_resource.trigger: User clicks 'Add Link' in Resources tab of project detail
steps: Opens modal (URL, category, notes)
Calls api.addResource(projectId, data) → POST /api/v1/projects/:id/resources
Fastify fetches the URL, parses HTML for OG metadata (title, description, favicon, og:image)
Creates resource in DB, logs 'resource_added' activity
Returns 201 → resources list refreshes

delete_resource.trigger: User clicks trash icon on a resource card
steps: Confirms, then DELETE /api/v1/resources/:resourceId
Fastify deletes from DB → list refreshes

collaboration.overview: Friend system (search, request, accept) + project member management with roles.

search_users.trigger: User types 2+ characters in friends search bar
steps: GET /api/v1/users/search?q=...
Fastify queries: LOWER(name) LIKE %q% OR LOWER(email) LIKE %q%, excludes current user
Returns matching users → displayed in dropdown with 'Add' button

send_friend_request.trigger: User clicks 'Add' on a search result
steps: POST /api/v1/friends/request with { user_id }
Fastify inserts friendships row with status='pending'
Creates notification for target user
Returns { sent: true }

accept_friend_request.trigger: User clicks 'Accept' on a pending request
steps: POST /api/v1/friends/accept with { user_id }
Fastify updates friendships status to 'accepted'
Friends list refreshes

add_member_to_project.trigger: Owner clicks 'Add Member' in project detail sidebar
steps: Searches user by email, selects, assigns role
POST /api/v1/projects/:id/members with { user_id, role }
Fastify: inserts project_members, creates notification, logs 'member_added' activity
Returns 201 → members list refreshes

github_integration.overview: Link GitHub repositories to projects and view repo metadata.

link_repo.trigger: User enters owner/repo in GitHub link modal
steps: POST /api/v1/projects/:id/link-repo with { repo: 'owner/repo' }
Fastify inserts into linked_repos table (upsert by project_id)
Returns { linked: true, repo }
GET /api/v1/projects/:id/repo-status
Fastify fetches GitHub API for repo info (description, language, stars, pushed_at)
Returns combined linked_repo + repo_data
Displayed as GitHub badge on project detail

notifications.overview: In-app notification system for friend requests, member invites, and task assignments.

list_notifications.trigger: User visits /notifications or sidebar notification bell
steps: GET /api/v1/notifications → returns 50 most recent
Displays unread count badge in header
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read-all → Fastify sets read=true for all user's notifications

user_settings.overview: User profile, dark/light theme toggle, timezone, streak preferences.

theme_toggle.trigger: User clicks sun/moon in Navbar or toggles switch in Settings
steps: useThemeStore.toggle() sets isDark = !isDark
Saves to localStorage('theme') = 'dark'|'light'
Toggles 'dark' class on document.documentElement
CSS variables swap via :root (dark) vs :root:not(.dark) (light) selectors
Tailwind classes (bg-dark-800, border-dark-300, text-text-primary) reference var() → colors update automatically

update_timezone.trigger: User changes timezone in Settings → Save
steps: PATCH /api/v1/users/me with { timezone }
Fastify updates user in DB → returns updated user

AppContent.role: Root layout wrapper: auth guard, loading spinner, dark mode init, session checks

design_system.name: Landa
design_system.base: Dark theme with light mode support

known_issues.react_strictmode_double_fire: Effects fire twice in dev. Handled in task completion (double-check) and checkSession guards.
known_issues.api_client_cors: Removed — API calls now go same-origin via Next.js rewrites() in next.config.js. No CORS needed.
known_issues.dark_mode_flash_fix: Inline <script> in <head> reads localStorage and removes 'dark' class before React hydrates. suppressHydrationWarning on <html>.
known_issues.logout_reverse: AppContent skips checkSession on /login and /api/auth/* paths to prevent re-auth race after logout.
known_issues.tailwind_dynamic_classes: Dashboard stat labels changed from dynamic interpolation 'text-${color}' to static 'text-accent' etc. Tailwind cannot tree-shake dynamically constructed class names.
known_issues.contribution_graph_months: Month labels now use weekIndex math (weekIndex / 4.3 % 12) instead of i % 4 filter to align correctly across 52 weeks.
known_issues.settings_streak_prefs: Streak checkboxes are now controlled components with onChange handlers that immediately persist via api.updateProfile().
known_issues.project_card_null_date: getTimeAgo() now returns empty string for null/missing dates instead of crashing.
